faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.description: Common questions about Lumina — and if something is missing, our team replies in under a business day.

what-is.question: What does the platform actually do?
what-is.answer: Lumina turns scripts, documents and prompts into lifelike avatar videos and real-time agents you can drop into your product, marketing site, training portal or sales workflow.

how-fast.question: How quickly can I publish my first avatar?
how-fast.answer: Most teams ship their first avatar in under two minutes from sign-up: pick a presenter, paste a script, choose a voice and language, then export or embed.

languages.question: Which languages and voices are supported?
languages.answer: We support 80+ languages and locales with native-sounding voices, including regional accents. You can also clone a brand voice with consent for premium plans.

security.question: Is my data safe to use with enterprise content?
security.answer: Yes. We are SOC 2 Type II, encrypt data at rest and in transit, never train shared models on customer content, and offer regional residency and SSO on enterprise plans.

brand.question: Can I bring my own brand likeness or presenters?
brand.answer: Absolutely. Upload your brand kit, customize avatar wardrobes and backdrops, or onboard a custom presenter from a short consented recording.

pricing.question: How does pricing work?
pricing.answer: There is a free tier for individuals and small teams, usage-based plans for growing companies, and custom enterprise pricing with dedicated infrastructure and SLAs.
